title: Warm Garlicky Polish Trout Stew
description: A hearty Polish stew featuring rainbow trout, garlic, and leafy greens, all cooked to perfection in one pot. This dish is egg-free and features a unique leaf-wrap-steam cooking method.
instructions: Rinse the trout fillets under cold water and pat them dry with paper towels.
Heat the butter in a large pot over medium heat and saute the garlic and onion until softened.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes to the pot, cooking for 5 minutes or until they start to soften.
Add the chicken broth, lemon juice, and chopped fresh dill to the pot, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the trout fillets to the pot, spooning some of the broth over the top of each fillet.
Cover the pot with a lid and steam the trout for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
Wrap each trout fillet in a fresh spinach leaf and serve immediately, spooning some of the garlicky broth over the top.
